Family-ready. Not family-only.

A city stay designed
around real life.

For couples, families and work trips — with family needs properly solved.

Why we exist

Family-ready,
not family-only.

Some guests arrive as a couple. Some with children. Some with a laptop and one free evening. Alia House is designed around the hardest version of a city stay: travelling with children.

Early nights, early mornings, snacks, forgotten essentials, strollers, space to move — and parents who still want to enjoy the city. Solve that well, and the hotel becomes better for everyone: calm rooms, useful shared spaces and small services that make the city easier to enjoy.

Our philosophy

"A stay should do more than house you.
It should hold the rhythm of your day."

Real travel does not follow one schedule. Children sleep early, business calls run late, couples want a drink, and someone always needs a snack, a quiet corner or an extra hand. We design for that rhythm.

What we stand for

Three pillars.
One standard.

01
Belonging
Expected. Not tolerated.
You feel accepted in the place. The hotel makes room for the way you actually travel.
02
Legacy
Travel that passes something on.
You carry something forward together. A ritual, a memory, a story, a city moment that becomes part of your shared life.
03
Becoming
The stay supports the family's growth.
You leave slightly changed. More curious, more connected, more at ease — because the stay gave you the space to experience the city and each other differently.

The internal journey

Every stay follows
the same arc.

Gather.
Connect and orient. You arrive alone, as a couple, for work, or with family — with bags, a laptop, a stroller, or someone who needs a snack. We're ready for all of it. The lobby is designed for the arrival, not the departure.
Hold.
Protect routines, memory and intimacy. The room keeps what matters close. The restaurant keeps a table. The playroom helps when children need space. You hold the things worth holding.
Become.
Leave calmer, lighter, more connected. Not every stay changes you. But a good one should leave a trace — a ritual, a memory, a place worth returning to. We design for the return.

Our brand promise

Together,
further.

Alia House exists for travellers who refuse to lower the bar when real life comes with them. We do not ask you to choose between a beautiful hotel and a room that actually works. We built the room that does both — and a building that holds everything else.

Book now
We support the real rhythm of the stay.
